name: Rum Flan Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a heart-shaped or round pan, caramelize half cup sugar until deep amber color.
3. Beat together the egg yolks, eggs, remaining sugar, evaporated milk, orange peel, and rum in a bowl.
4. Sift flour, salt, baking powder into another bowl.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add the oil, rum, and orange juice.
6. Gradually blend the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients until smooth.
7. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar until foamy.
8. Gently fold the batter into the egg white mixture.
9. Pour the custard mixture over the caramel in the pan.
10. Spoon the cake batter over the flan mixture.
11. Place the pan in a larger pan, add hot water to half depth of the cake pan.
12. Bake for 50-60 minutes until set and lightly browned.
13. Cool on a rack or refrigerate until ready to serve.
14. Invert onto a serving platter and pipe whipped cream rosettes around the edges of the flan.
